candidates.why: Direct revenue line and preferred candidate; appears to be the insurer's top-line under different reporting presentations.
Balancing row, not an actual revenue line, so not preferred.

variables.notes: The row label 'Insurance revenue' appears twice on the Income Statement preview, and the schema cannot distinguish between duplicate identical labels. Selected it as the best revenue label, but duplicate-row ambiguity requires manual review.

candidates.why: Generic COGS candidate, but for this insurance company it does not appear to be the operative direct-cost line.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the insurance-specific direct cost concept. Selected 'Insurance service expenses' from the full preview as the closest analogue to cost of sales / direct service costs for recent years. Manual review needed because older periods may instead use labels such as 'Cost of Insurance Contracts' or claims-based lines. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Insurance service expenses

candidates.why: Overhead-type label, but preview is mostly empty.
Explicit SG&A row and populated; per rules this should be selected alone when present.
SG&A component, but explicit SG&A row already exists and is populated, so component not needed.
Possible overhead label, but mostly empty and less explicit than the SG&A row.
Not an expense row; not appropriate for SG&A.

variables.notes: Explicit populated SG&A row exists, so selected only that row per hierarchy. Excluded labor/admin component rows to avoid double counting.
No dedicated research and development expense line found on the provided statements.

candidates.row_label: Net finance expenses from insurance contract
candidates.why: Finance-related, but not preferred when a direct interest expense line exists.
Direct interest expense line and populated across years; best match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific subcomponent of interest expense, not preferred over the broader line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subcomponent, not preferred over the broader line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not preferred when direct interest expense exists.

variables.notes: Selected the direct interest expense line; excluded balancing and subcomponent rows.

candidates.why: Not book equity; income statement line unrelated to shareholders' equity.
Earnings line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line excluding minority interest.
Includes minority interest, so less preferred when parent-only equity exists.
Balancing row, not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total liabilities and equity, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity line to avoid double counting minority interest.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority interest.
Income statement line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / NCI line.
Same concept with capitalization variant; useful as fallback because reporting label varies by year.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement OCI allocation, not balance sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
